title: The Kodak EC35 is a pocketable, beginner-friendly 35mm film camera - Engadget
summary: For beginners to film cameras, the new Kodak EC35 offers an even lower barrier to entry than Reto's $100 Kodak Snapic A1 camera and the $50 EKTAR H35 half frame camera from a few years ago.
